meta.title: Kapitol — The SpaceX & Tesla of Construction

slides.headline: The SpaceX and Tesla of construction.
slides.subheadline: Australia's software-native builder — engineering the industry's next decade.

slides.headline: The last trillion-dollar industry software hasn't rebuilt.
slides.subheadline: SpaceX rewrote aerospace. Tesla rewrote the car. Building is next — and it's ours to take.
bullets: Legacy builders run on paper, silos and rework.
Margins stay thin because the model never changed.
Kapitol was built digital-first from day one, 2018.
We compete on systems, data and AI — not just steel.

slides.headline: Build-first is dead. We model first, build second.

left.title: The old industry
bullets: Build first, find the problems on site.
A bespoke process on every project.
Data trapped in disconnected tools.
Peer margins stuck in low single digits.

right.title: The Kapitol model
bullets: Model first, then build with certainty.
One standard process, run at scale.
Common data platform, connected end to end.
Margin and delivery beyond our peers.

slides.headline: The disruptor's playbook, applied to building.

cards.title: First principles
cards.body: Rebuild delivery from ground truth, not tradition.

cards.title: Vertical integration
cards.body: Own the digital stack across the whole project lifecycle.

cards.title: The data flywheel
cards.body: Every project makes the next one faster, safer, cheaper.

cards.title: Reusable & modular
cards.body: Standardise once, then repeat with centralised systems.

slides.headline: Not a pitch. A track record.
We're pouring the launchpads of the AI age.
slides.subheadline: The hyperscaler data-centre wave is the biggest infrastructure build of our lifetime.

slides.headline: AI needs buildings. We build them.
slides.subheadline: Every model, every agent, every chip runs inside infrastructure someone has to deliver.
bullets: Hyperscaler demand is driving a data-centre supercycle.
Kapitol has the pipeline and delivery momentum now.
This funds the capacity to invest and compound.
Picks and shovels for the intelligence economy.

slides.headline: Operational excellence is the launch platform for AI.

steps.title: Standardise
steps.body: One defined process, centralised and resource-leveraged.

steps.title: Connect data
steps.body: A common data platform, wired end to end.

steps.title: Automate & apply AI
steps.body: Embed AI to remove work, not add it.

steps.title: Compound
steps.body: Every cycle lifts productivity, margin and people.

cards.title: Model-first delivery
cards.body: Certainty engineered before the first pour.

cards.title: AI & automation
cards.body: A use-case pipeline compounding into advantage.

cards.title: Systems thinking
cards.body: We optimise the whole, not just the site.

slides.headline: The systems behind the mission.
slides.subheadline: Like any hard-tech company, our edge is the platform underneath.
bullets: One unified enterprise technology strategy.
A target-state architecture built to scale.
A modern operating model with real ownership.
Portfolio governance that turns spend into value.

slides.headline: We don't build faster. We rebuild how building works.
slides.subheadline: Kapitol — the SpaceX and Tesla of construction.
